title: The Comedians
writer: Olly Boeheim, Axel Eggebrecht, Georg Wilhelm Pabst
actors: Käthe Dorsch, Hilde Krahl, Henny Porten
plot: For his first return film in now National Socialist Germany, Pabst presented a historical tribute to the very first national theater troupe there,founded by a group of actors in the town of Weimar in the 18th century.
